extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters by direction and category: I counted only the “Against” rows, with criminal proceedings of Nil for the Company, Directors, Promoters and Subsidiary; statutory/regulatory proceedings of 1 against the Directors and Nil against the other listed entities; and tax proceedings of 3 against the Company plus 2 against the Subsidiary. I excluded all “By” rows, including 7 tax proceedings by the Company, and the quantified aggregate against the Company and Subsidiary is ₹3.11 million + ₹1.20 million = ₹4.31 million, converted to ₹0.431 crore. The contingent-liabilities figure is the stated Total of ₹13.69 million as of September 30, 2023, converted to ₹1.369 crore; it is not re-summed beyond using the stated Total. The concentration disclosure is company-wide top-five customer contribution to revenue from operations: 82.66% for the most recent full fiscal year, Fiscal 2023; no company-wide top-ten customer revenue percentage is disclosed. The litigation and contingent-liability tables use ₹ million, and conversion is by dividing by 10 because ₹10 million equals ₹1 crore.
